audit_items.proof_trace: All pointer dereferences in service_pool.h are guarded: cache pointers have explicit null checks (FindService L327), list traversals use while(sp!=NULL) guards (ListService, NextSlot), and SCHECK assertions (which call abort() in both debug and release via default_log_handler) protect method-id bounds and the svc!=NULL precondition. The only unguarded dereference is _desc->full_name() at L138, which is protected by the ServiceBoard constructor invariant: SetDescriptor(_svc_desc->method(i)) is called for every method board before the pool is accessible, and protobuf guarantees method(i) is non-NULL for valid indices. No external network path can reach _desc==NULL at this call site.
